source.title: Trustpilot Reviews for Temu + BBB + Sitejabber + PissedConsumer

extractions.claim: Temu Trustpilot rating: 2.0/5 with 48,750 reviews (scraper output)
extractions.evidence: Rating: 2.0, Total Reviews: 48,750 total. Produced by scrape-trustpilot.py script.

extractions.claim: Temu BBB rating improved from C+ (Jan 2024) to B- (Dec 2025)
extractions.evidence: BBB rating rose from C+ in January 2024 to B- by December 2025. Temu is not BBB accredited.

extractions.claim: Temu has 2/5 on Sitejabber (1,760 reviews) and 2.6/5 on PissedConsumer (62,683 reviews)
10.9% of Temu Trustpilot reviews are likely AI-generated (up 1,361% from 2022)
extractions.evidence: AI-generated review rate on Trustpilot for Temu increased from 0.75% in 2022 to 10.90% in 2025 — a 1,361% increase.

verification.verifier_notes: Source: Originality.AI analysis of Trustpilot reviews

extractions.claim: Top Temu complaint themes: product quality, deceptive pricing, bot customer service, refund delays
extractions.evidence: Common complaints: poor product quality ('poorly made, not as described'), deceptive pricing (extra charges at checkout), terrible AI bot customer service ('you can't reason with a bot'), slow refunds ('can take weeks or months'), misleading product images.

verification.verifier_notes: Aggregated from Trustpilot, BBB, Sitejabber reviews

extractions.claim: 34% of Trustpilot users rated Temu 5 stars despite overall 2.0 average
extractions.evidence: Around 34% of users have rated Temu five stars, creating a polarized distribution. Positive reviews note good bargains on small items.
